docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-27-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SERRAMONTE KIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-19-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDSAY RIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SERRAMONTE KIA, REPRESENTED BY ARASH HAIDARI, CO-GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $815.00. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT MAY BE ISSUED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506) (FILE RETAINED IN D.506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-29-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LINDSAY RIOS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506) (FILE RETAINED IN D.506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
